Variables.Name: ParameterName
Variables.Description: The name of the sound instance parameter that specifies the current value.

Variables.Name: Default
Variables.Description: The default value to be used if the parameter is not found.

Variables.Name: MinInput
Variables.Description: The minimum input value. Values will be clamped to the [MinInput, MaxInput] range.

Variables.Name: MaxInput
Variables.Description: The maximum input value. Values will be clamped to the [MinInput, MaxInput] range.

Variables.Name: MinOutput
Variables.Description: The minimum output value. The input value will be scaled from the range [MinInput, MaxInput] to [MinOut, MaxOutput]

Variables.Name: MaxOutput
Variables.Description: The maximum output value. The input value will be scaled from the range [MinInput, MaxInput] to [MinOut, MaxOutput]

Variables.Name: ParamMode
Variables.Description: The mode with which to treat the input value
